---
title: "\'A wheel and a fall\'. By C.M. Yonge"
---

## \'A wheel and a fall\'. By C.M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1898
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Short Story in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (December 1898) 2-9.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
